channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Go (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Go nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🐹 santifer/career-ops (12074 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: santifer

📝 Repository: santifer/career-ops

📄 Descrizione: AI-powered job search system built on Claude Code. 14 skill modes, Go dashboard, PDF generation, batch processing.

⭐ Stelle: 12074

🍴 Forks: 2251

💻 Linguaggio: Go

🏷️ Topics: ai-agent anthropic automation career claude claude-code cli golang interview-prep job-search open-source resume

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-04T18:21:18Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-07T04:28:36Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐹 larksuite/cli (7282 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: larksuite

📝 Repository: larksuite/cli

📄 Descrizione: The official Lark/Feishu CLI tool, maintained by the larksuite team — built for humans and AI Agents. Covers core business domains including Messenger, Docs, Base, Sheets, Calendar, Mail, Tasks, Meetings, and more, with 200+ commands and 19 AI Agent Skills.

⭐ Stelle: 7282

🍴 Forks: 443

💻 Linguaggio: Go

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-25T07:13:30Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-10T04:40:54Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐹 chenhg5/cc-connect (3425 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: chenhg5

📝 Repository: chenhg5/cc-connect

📄 Descrizione: Bridge local AI coding agents (Claude Code, Cursor, Gemini CLI, Codex) to messaging platforms (Feishu/Lark, DingTalk, Slack, Telegram, Discord, LINE, WeChat Work). Chat with your AI dev assistant from anywhere — no public IP required for most platforms.

⭐ Stelle: 3425

🍴 Forks: 299

💻 Linguaggio: Go

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-28T02:39:39Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-29T04:04:35Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐹 shankar0123/certctl (289 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: shankar0123

📝 Repository: shankar0123/certctl

📄 Descrizione: Self-hosted certificate lifecycle automation platform. Any CA, any server, zero human intervention. Full REST API, web dashboard, and agent-based deployment where private keys never leave your infrastructure. Includes CLI, MCP server for AI assistants, and compliance mapping for SOC 2, PCI-DSS, and NIST.

⭐ Stelle: 289

🍴 Forks: 18

💻 Linguaggio: Go

🏷️ Topics: certificate-lifecycle-management

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-14T12:22:29Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-10T03:33:53Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🐹 isboyjc/GoProxy (280 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: isboyjc

📝 Repository: isboyjc/GoProxy

📄 Descrizione: GoProxy 从多个公开代理源自动抓取 HTTP/SOCKS5 代理，通过严格验证（出口 IP + 位置 + 延迟）后加入智能代理池，对外提供 HTTP 和 SOCKS5 双协议代理服务。系统采用质量分级、智能补充、自动优化等机制，确保代理池始终保持高质量和稳定性。

⭐ Stelle: 280

🍴 Forks: 89

💻 Linguaggio: Go

📜 Licenza: No license

⏰ Creato il: 2026-03-27T15:11:41Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-04-10T04:09:32Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

📝 Repository: geekjourneyx/jina-cli

📄 Descrizione: A lightweight CLI tool wrapping Jina AI Reader API for AI Agents. Fetch and parse any URL into LLM-friendly formats (Markdown/Text/HTML). Perfect for reading X(Twitter), blogs, and news sites.
